messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: CONTINUE_WORKER with allow verdict—closure evidence covers wrong batch, no monotonic path exists
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Unresolved dependency: Deviation closure for batch X-78 with visible assay alert DEV-XOR-078. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 only. No authoritative source evidence closes deviation for X-78. Status: BLOCKED.

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_rationale: Worker verdict ESCALATE with binding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN is correct. Gate passed. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 while action requires batch X-78. Policy STD-XOR-078-P demands exact batch match. Open blocker is NOT repairable field data—it is a source-boundary identity mismatch: wrong batch in closure evidence. No monotonic preservation can bridge a batch-identity gap.
full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed; worker correctly identified source boundary violation (batch X-79 in closure vs X-78 required for release). Verdict ESCALATE with binding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN preserved. No repairable field failure—batch identity mismatch is fatal to execution.
must_preserve: exact batch-identity match requirement per STD-XOR-078-P
blocked_moves: CONTINUE_WORKER with allow verdict—closure evidence covers wrong batch, no monotonic path exists
CONTINUE_REPAIR targeting batch field in CLOSE-XOR-078 without new authoritative source evidence
FINAL_COMPILER with ALLOW verdict—batch identity mismatch violates policy hard requirement
treating CLOSE-XOR-078 as if it covers X-78 when content explicitly names X-79
substituting adjacent batch closure record as if it satisfies target batch release

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May quality release the clinical batch?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No match; closure record does not cover batch X-78",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match of batch, assay, criterion, and date",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Narrow defect open: batch mismatch blocks release",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Closure required before release date 2026-06-28; scope fails on batch identity"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "BATCH-XOR-078",
    "DEV-XOR-078",
    "CLOSE-XOR-078",
    "STD-XOR-078-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "exact source-boundary match",
    "no adjacent-record substitution"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may not proceed. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 while BATCH-XOR-078 requires X-78 release. STD-XOR-078-P demands exact batch-assay-criterion-date match before execution. Visible deviation remains unresolved for the target batch. Source boundary stays open.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "CLOSE-XOR-078 covers X-79 not X-78"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May quality release the clinical batch?

context.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
context.anomaly_observed: An assay deviation alert remains visible, while deviation closure may exactly match the release boundary.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Batch release BATCH-XOR-078 releases clinical batch X-78 for shipment on 2026-06-28.
Deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains visible for assay AX-22 criterion Cq<=31.
Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28 before shipment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Clinical batch release is complete only when deviation closure matches batch, assay, acceptance criterion, and release date before release.
